title: The Emperor's Candlesticks
writer: Baroness Emmuska Orczy, Harold Goldman, Monckton Hoffe
actors: William Powell, Luise Rainer, Robert Young
plot: A male Polish secret agent and a female Russian secret-police spy smuggle messages to St. Petersburg in candlesticks. While chasing after stolen candlesticks they discover each other's identity and fall in love.
